headline: AEye Shares Surge On Key Executive Hire: What Investors Need To Know
summary: AEye Inc shares are rallying Friday morning following the appointment of Paul Berton as the company's new Vice President of Operations and Quality. Here’s what investors need to know. Former Lucid Motors and Apple Executive Joins AEye Leadership Berton brings a resume from Lucid Motors, where he led manufacturing and engineering for low-voltage ECUs across more than 30 products. His background also includes leadership roles at Apple and Intel. Don't Miss: A single bad hire can set a startup back
